nasb.text: So all Israel went down to the Philistines, each to sharpen his plowshare, his mattock, his axe, and his hoe.

esv.text: But every one of the Israelites went down to the Philistines to sharpen his plowshare, his mattock, his axe, or his sickle,

cnv.text: 以色列眾人要磨鋤頭、犁頭、斧頭和鏟子，就各自下到非利士人那裡去磨。

ccb.text: 以色列人都要到非利士的铁匠那里去磨锄、犁、斧和铲。
